name: Mars Pathfinder + Sojourner
fact: First-ever Mars rover (Sojourner, 11 kg, microwave-sized). Demonstrated airbag-cushioned EDL — the same pattern Spirit and Opportunity later used. Sojourner traversed ~100 m and analysed 16 rocks before the lander relay died. Pathfinder's images popularised Mars on the early web — the first interplanetary mission whose data the public consumed in real time.
capability: Proved low-cost, faster-cheaper Mars missions could deliver primary science. Inaugurated mobile robotic exploration of Mars.
